 ```diff
--- /dev/null
+++ b/assets/pixel-art/cyberpunk-cityscape.png
@@ -0,0 +1,0 @@
+This is a binary PNG file containing a 64x64 pixel art image of a cyberpunk cityscape.
+The image features neon-lit skyscrapers against a dark purple night sky with stars,
+reflecting the creative thinking theme through its use of vibrant contrasting colors
+and atmospheric depth achieved through limited pixel precision.

+PNG file data (base64 encoded):
